summary: Comprehensive testing of FilterBottomSheet mobile feature and filter system. Backend: 12/12 tests pass. Frontend: All major features working. Two bugs found: (1) 'Made with Emergent' badge blocks Apply Filters button at 390px mobile viewport, (2) venue_types:[] empty array counted as 1 active filter showing false badge count on fresh load.

ui_bugs.issue:
The 'Made with Emergent' platform badge (z-index:9999, bottom-4 right-4) overlaps the Apply Filters button in the sticky footer. elementFromPoint() at Apply button center returns the badge's

Made with Emergent

instead of the Apply button. Users cannot tap Apply on mobile — only JS .click() bypass works.

activeFilterCount shows '1' on fresh page load (no filters applied). Root cause: venue_types:[] (empty array) is truthy in JavaScript, so it passes the filter condition `value && value !== '' && value !== false`. Fix: add Array.isArray(value) check: `if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.length > 0`. Also affects desktop sidebar showing 'Clear All Filters (1)' on fresh load.

integration_issues.issue: In test, backdrop click (force=True) did not reliably close the sheet. May be timing issue or badge interference. X close button and Apply both work correctly.

issues: The 'Made with Emergent' badge (fixed bottom-4 right-4) visually and functionally overlaps the Apply Filters button (fixed bottom-0). Apply button partially hidden behind badge at 390px viewport.

action_items: FIX HIGH: VenueSearchPage.js activeFilterCount - add Array.isArray(value) check to prevent venue_types:[] from counting. Change: `if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.length > 0;` before the existing filter condition.

FIX HIGH: FilterBottomSheet Apply button blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge. Options: (1) increase FilterBottomSheet z-index to >99999, (2) add `pointer-events-none` to badge or parent, (3) add safe-area padding/margin to FilterBottomSheet sticky footer bottom (e.g., pb-16 when badge is present). Apply button at y=780-828 on 844px screen, badge at bottom-4.
FIX MINOR: Pre-existing React warning 'Cannot update BrowserRouter while rendering VenueSearchPage' in handleVenueTypeToggle still present.
critical_code_review_comments: VenueSearchPage.js line 412-414: activeFilterCount incorrectly counts venue_types:[] as 1 active filter. JavaScript empty array is truthy. Add: if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.length > 0;

FilterBottomSheet.jsx: The sticky footer at z-[9999] is same level as 'Made with Emergent' badge. At 390px, Apply button (right side) is blocked. Consider increasing sheet z-index to z-[99999] or add bottom-safe-area padding.
VenueSearchPage.js: React warning 'Cannot update BrowserRouter while rendering VenueSearchPage' in handleVenueTypeToggle (setSearchParams called during render) - pre-existing from iteration_34.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (13/14 features pass; Apply button blocked at mobile by badge + false filter badge count on fresh load)

seed_data_creation: None - existing test venues from previous agents: 'Update Test Venue cf9c27', 'Update Test Venue c22a5a', 'Update Test Venue 402941' appear in Delhi filter results
context_for_next_testing_agent: FilterBottomSheet fully tested. Core flows all work: open bottom sheet, select venue types, apply, chips appear, X removes chips, Clear All restores 13 venues, validation works (guest_min>max shows error), empty state works, skeleton loads 6 cards. Two bugs need fixing: (1) venue_types:[] counts as filter - fix activeFilterCount in VenueSearchPage.js, (2) Apply button blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge at 390px (use page.evaluate('.click()') as workaround in tests). Desktop sidebar at 1440px works fully. City=Delhi returns 5 venues. data-testid availability: mobile-filter-btn, filter-bottom-sheet, filter-backdrop, filter-sheet-close, filter-apply-btn, filter-clear-btn, filter-vtype-{type}, filter-amenity-{key}, filter-guest-min, filter-guest-max, filter-price-min, filter-price-max, filter-chips, chip-{key}, clear-all-chips-btn.

backend.GET /api/venues structure: PASS - venue_id, name, city fields present

frontend.Apply Filters (via Playwright force=True: FAIL - blocked by Made with Emergent badge at z:9999
frontend.Initial filter badge shows '1' bug: BUG CONFIRMED - venue_types:[] counted as filter

apply_button_blocked.root_cause: The FilterBottomSheet has z-index:9999. The 'Made with Emergent' badge also has z-index:9999 and is positioned at fixed bottom-4 right-4. Since the badge renders LATER in the DOM (after FilterBottomSheet), at equal z-index, the badge appears ON TOP. The Apply button is in the sticky footer at bottom-0, overlapping with the badge at bottom-16px. At 390px width, the Apply button is ~222px wide starting at x=147 (center ~258px), and the badge center is approximately at x=258, y=804 — exactly at the Apply button center.
apply_button_blocked.fix: Option 1: Increase FilterBottomSheet z-index to z-[99999]. Option 2: Add `pointer-events-none` class to the Made with Emergent badge container. Option 3: Add bottom padding to FilterBottomSheet sticky footer (e.g., pb-12) to shift Apply button above badge area.
apply_button_blocked.reproduction: Open /venues/search at 390x844 viewport, click Filters, select any venue type, try to click Apply Filters — the badge intercepts the click.

venue_types_false_count.root_cause: In VenueSearchPage.js, activeFilterCount iterates over all filter entries. For venue_types:[], JavaScript considers [] truthy. The condition `value && value !== '' && value !== false` evaluates to true for empty array, counting it as 1 active filter even when no venue types are selected.
venue_types_false_count.fix: Add Array check: `if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.length > 0;` before the existing condition. Fix location: VenueSearchPage.js line 412-414.
venue_types_false_count.reproduction: Load /venues/search fresh with no URL params. Filters button shows '1' badge. Desktop sidebar shows 'Clear All Filters (1)'.
